inputs.description: Select the Maglev debug run mode

configurations.name: Debug: Windows x64
configurations.command: bash -lc 'cd "${workspaceFolder}" && "${MAGLEV_WINDOWS_CMD:-cmd.exe}" /C "if exist target\windows-x64\debug\CMakeCache.txt del /Q target\windows-x64\debug\CMakeCache.txt >nul 2>nul & if exist target\windows-x64\debug\CMakeFiles rmdir /S /Q target\windows-x64\debug\CMakeFiles >nul 2>nul & cmake --preset windows-x64-debug && cmake --build --preset windows-x64-debug && target\windows-x64\debug\maglev.exe"'
